title: Build Bash hook enforcement for background agents

log.context: Build Bash hook enforcement for background agents

Done. Here's a complete summary of what was found and what was done:

## What was found

**Previous attempts (#43/#44 tasks) stalled for a self-defeating reason:** The first task created `bash-intercept.sh` and registered it in `settings.json` at 07:55:07. But then the agent itself couldn't use Bash anymore — the hook blocked its own shell commands. It sat unable to proceed for 48 minutes until killed. Both tasks were victims of the hook they were implementing.

**Current state when I started:**...(truncated)
